summary: Great performance featuring a smoking Dark Star and China Cat > Rider, but the soundboard recording is warbly and often poor.
review: Fans rave about the energetic show – Jerry’s duck‑walk on Around & Around, an epic Dark Star, and a blazing China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider – while lamenting that the SBD source suffers from heat‑damage artifacts and muffled bass. The music shines despite the recording’s flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is consistently praised (≈4.5/5) while recording quality is widely criticized (≈2/5); weighted average yields ~3.8.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warbly, heat‑ or water‑damaged sound; bass drops out unless EQ'd flat; overall listenable after EQ but far from pristine.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Long lyrical first half leading into a feedback‑laden bass section, then high‑energy jams; stage antics keep momentum high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Notable duck‑walk on Around & Around, airborne stage leaping with Bob, strong guitar tone on Dark Star and rare vocal moment in Stella Blue.
band_member_comments.Phil: Briefly thanked the audience after China Cat > Rider; bass noted as central to the psychedelic section.
band_member_comments.Bob: Joined Jerry in opposite‑side stage run during Around & Around; contributed solid rhythm work.
